title: Creator Discovery & Matching
label: How do brands currently discover and select creators for campaigns?
context: Creator discovery is the core value proposition. Better matching means faster deal closure and higher campaign success rates.

options.label: Manual keyword search
options.context: Brands search by name or keywords; no intelligent filtering

options.label: Basic filtering available
options.context: Category, follower count, location — but matching is manual

options.label: Keyword-based recommendations
options.context: Keyword searching plus sorting by basic metrics

options.label: Smart matching suggestions
options.context: Suggestions based on campaign requirements and creator attributes

options.label: AI-powered recommendations
options.context: ML learning from successful brand-creator pairings

title: Marketplace Data & Analytics
label: How well integrated is creator data (profiles, campaigns, engagement metrics)?
context: Integrated data is the foundation for AI/ML (matching, fraud detection, predictions). Better integration means faster algorithms and time to value.

options.label: Scattered data
options.context: Much information is manual or not stored

options.label: Basic profiles exist
options.context: Campaign history and metrics are incomplete

options.label: Integrated with dashboards
options.context: Profiles and campaign data integrated; basic dashboards exist

options.label: Rich with analytics
options.context: Campaign history, engagement analysis, performance metrics

options.label: ML-ready intelligence system
options.context: Unified data with real-time metrics, trends, and ML-ready datasets

title: Campaign Management & Tracking
label: How comprehensive is your campaign management and performance tracking?
context: Campaign data enables AI-powered insights and optimization. Better tracking improves brand satisfaction and platform margins.

options.label: Mostly manual
options.context: Limited tracking of performance

options.label: Basic tracking
options.context: Start date, budget, status tracked; limited metrics

options.label: Tracked with metrics
options.context: Engagement metrics collected, but no comparative analysis

options.label: Comprehensive management
options.context: Performance dashboards and ROI calculations available

options.label: Advanced with predictions
options.context: Orchestration with predictive analytics and recommendations

title: Fraud Detection & Trust
label: How do you currently approach fraud detection and creator verification?
context: Fraud detection protects brand trust and platform reputation. AI-powered verification is a major competitive differentiator.

options.label: No formal process
options.context: Creators trusted based on follower count and profile

options.label: Manual review only
options.context: Suspicious creators reviewed manually; limited checks

options.label: Basic automated checks
options.context: Account age, posting frequency checked; manual review continues

options.label: Automated detection
options.context: Fake followers and bot engagement detected with verification badges

options.label: Advanced behavioral analysis
options.context: Multi-layer fraud detection with behavioral signals and trust scoring

title: Creator Insights & Intelligence
label: What level of analytics and insights do you provide to creators?
context: Creator insights drive INFLOW Academy adoption, increase retention, and differentiate from larger platforms.

options.label: No analytics provided
options.context: Creators rely on platform native insights

options.label: Basic dashboards
options.context: Follower count and post engagement shown

options.label: Performance insights
options.context: Engagement rates, growth trends, audience insights available

options.label: Advanced analytics
options.context: Content performance breakdown and campaign ROI analysis

options.label: AI-powered recommendations
options.context: Growth predictions, peer benchmarking, recommendations

title: Trend & Content Intelligence
label: How do creators and brands discover emerging trends and content opportunities?
context: Trend intelligence enables early-mover advantage. AI detection can become a valuable product and drive engagement.

options.label: No formal tracking
options.context: Users rely on platform native trends

options.label: Manual trend lists
options.context: Trends maintained manually; updates infrequent

options.label: Periodic trend reports
options.context: Basic tracking of emerging content types

options.label: Real-time dashboards
options.context: Emerging hashtags and content formats shown live

options.label: AI trend detection
options.context: Emerging trends and creator identification with growth predictions

title: Event Analytics & Optimization
label: How do you analyze INFLOW Summit and event data for insights?
context: Event data optimization increases sponsorship ROI and improves future event design.

options.label: Tracked manually
options.context: Limited analysis or insights generated

options.label: Basic metrics tracked
options.context: Attendance and sponsorships measured; limited analysis

options.label: Event dashboards
options.context: Attendance, engagement, and sponsorship ROI tracked

options.label: Advanced analysis
options.context: Networking patterns and ROI by sponsorship type analyzed

options.label: Predictive recommendations
options.context: Event optimization and attendee connection recommendations

title: Business Intelligence
label: How do you currently forecast platform growth, revenue, and user behavior?
context: Better forecasting enables smarter resource allocation, pricing, and strategic planning.

options.label: Ad-hoc forecasting
options.context: Forecasting based on informal projections

options.label: Basic trend analysis
options.context: Historical trend analysis for revenue and growth

options.label: Structured models
options.context: Linear or simple time-series models updated quarterly

options.label: Advanced forecasting
options.context: Multiple scenarios and sensitivity analysis available

options.label: Predictive models
options.context: ML models for behavior, churn, and lifetime value

title: Team Capabilities
label: What is your team's current ML, data science, and analytics experience?
context: Team expertise determines training needs, hiring urgency, and realistic timelines.

options.label: No ML expertise
options.context: No team members with ML/data science background

options.label: Basic analytics skills
options.context: 1-2 team members with SQL, Python, or Excel skills

options.label: Multiple data people
options.context: 3-4 with data background; basic ML familiarity

options.label: Junior data scientist
options.context: Dedicated analyst or junior data scientist on team

options.label: Experienced ML team
options.context: Experienced team with production ML deployments

title: Data Infrastructure
label: How mature is your data infrastructure for analytics and ML?
context: Data infrastructure is the foundation for all AI/ML work. This determines development speed and capability.

options.label: No data warehouse
options.context: No structured data pipeline exists

options.label: Basic logging
options.context: Limited ability to query for analytics

options.label: Data warehouse exists
options.context: Analytics database with ETL pipelines for key datasets

options.label: Comprehensive infrastructure
options.context: Automated pipelines and analytics tools

options.label: Advanced ML-ready platform
options.context: Feature store, real-time processing, ML-ready datasets

title: AI Strategy & Commitment
label: How committed is leadership to building AI as a strategic priority?
context: Leadership commitment determines resource availability and long-term success.

options.label: Not a priority
options.context: No budget or plan for AI initiatives

options.label: Interest only
options.context: Interest in AI but no formal strategy

options.label: Early strategy
options.context: Budget allocated; early-stage strategy development

options.label: Clear strategy & resources
options.context: Clear roadmap; dedicated resources and team ownership

options.label: Strategic priority
options.context: AI central to strategy; significant investment; C-level accountability
